_comment: 2AIO delegation-enforcer. Hard PreToolUse rule (exit 2) that BLOCKS Claude from writing a substantial NEW implementation file itself — that bulk typing must be delegated to Codex. Deliberately narrow so Claude keeps its commander role: only the Write tool on a large code file is blocked. Edits to existing files (review/integration/fixes), planning docs, config, small files, tests, and the 2AIO repo itself are always allowed. Disable by setting enabled=false or creating the disable_flag file.
